mapper.sql: id, enterprise_id, template_id, template_version, audit_year, submission_json, extracted_data, status, submit_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tpl_submission WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tpl_submission WHERE id = #{id} AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tpl_submission WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_submission ( enterprise_id, template_id, template_version, audit_year, submission_json, extracted_data, status, submit_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseId}, #{templateId}, #{templateVersion}, #{auditYear}, #{submissionJson}, #{extractedData}, COALESCE(#{status}, 0), #{submitTime}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tpl_submission
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, submission_json = #{submissionJson}, extracted_data = #{extractedData}, status = #{status}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, template_version = #{templateVersion},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tpl_submission SET status = 0, submit_time = NULL, extracted_data = NULL, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
